evidence_coverage.formula: verified required evidence items / applicable required evidence items

conditions: no failed hard gate with effect FAIL
conditions and corrective actions are explicit
stage_score < 70 or any hard gate with effect FAIL fails
decisive evidence is unavailable or evidence_coverage < 0.50

baseline_selection.rule: Select the version with the strongest verified contract and semantic integrity for the intended next change, not automatically the latest version.
baseline_selection.hybrid_baseline_rule: A losing version may be used only as a named donor for individually verified components.

proof_fixture_policy.rule: A proof fixture establishes only the claims directly exercised by its documented oracle.
proof_fixture_policy.forbidden_inference: Fixture PASS implies package-level or project-level PASS.
proof_fixture_policy.simple_calculator_example: Arithmetic success may show a narrow execution path works; it does not validate glossary semantics, schemas, inventories, evidence, ADR references, or replay of the final package.
